title: Tool packageKind and registry integration
description:
Normative packageKind `tool` in platform-spec and pckg (dashboard, server, tests), `beskid pckg pack --package-kind tool`, install-card bpk token escaping, docs-ui Fluent refactor, api.json `tier` field and per-package artifact roots, and pckg submodule pin to v0.3 integrated tip.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`3db38a2`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/3db38a2)
- **Subject:** chore(submodules): pin compiler and pckg to v0.3 integrated tips
- **Closed:** 2026-05-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Cutoff:** `f57377a`→`aaddd32` on superrepo `beskid`
- **Workstreams:** `analysis-pipeline`, `stabilization`, `pckg-registry`

## Relation
Delivery anchor for **2** catalog task(s) in the v0.3 window; see linked workstreams and tasks with `milestoneId` / `deliverableId` `v03-pckg-tool-registry`.
